# ALLONE — All Systems. One Intelligence.
> AI automation agency based in Tbilisi, Georgia and Brussels, Belgium. We build custom AI solutions, intelligent chatbots, workflow automation, and modern websites for businesses worldwide.

## About ALLONE
ALLONE is an AI automation agency that converges all business systems into one intelligent layer. Founded in 2025, we deliver enterprise-grade AI solutions at startup speed. Our AI-powered delivery stack reduces implementation costs by up to 90% compared to traditional agencies.

## Services
- **AI Chatbots**: Custom conversational AI with natural language understanding, multi-language support, and seamless integration into existing platforms. 24/7 automated customer support.
- **Custom AI Solutions**: Bespoke machine learning models, computer vision systems, NLP pipelines, and AI agents tailored to specific business needs.
- **Workflow Automation**: End-to-end process automation using AI — from data extraction to decision-making. Integrate with CRMs, ERPs, and internal tools.
- **Website Development**: High-performance Next.js websites with AI-powered features, optimized for speed, SEO, and conversion.
- **Strategy & Consulting**: AI readiness assessment, implementation roadmaps, and ongoing optimization for businesses at any stage of AI adoption.

## Portfolio
- Equivalenza Georgia — E-Commerce platform
- DataRooms — AI-powered investor data rooms
- FIFTY — Community innovation space
- HostWise — Property management SaaS
- KaoTenders — B2B industrial tender platform
- Chaos Concept — Fashion & art concept store
- INNRBURIAL — Publishing & art platform
